columns.name: exchange
columns.comment: Stock exchange name (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE, LSE). NULL for non-stock instruments.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: PositionID
columns.comment: Unique identifier for an open or closed trading position. FK to Dim_Position/Fact_Position.

columns.name: OriginalPositionID
columns.comment: For partial-close children: parent PositionID. When OriginalPositionID ≠ PositionID → partial-close child.

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: Exchange
columns.comment: Stock exchange name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE, LSE). NULL for non-stock instruments. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: ActionType
columns.comment: The reason for closing the position.

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Customer country identifier. FK to Dim_Country.

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Marketing region label for this country. Loaded from etoro.Dictionary.MarketingRegion.Name via JOIN on MarketingRegionID. NOT the geographic region from Dictionary.Region. 22 distinct values (e.g., "ROW", "Africa", "French", "Arabic Other"). Used for marketing campaign grouping. (Tier 2 - SP_Dictionaries_Country_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Regulatory entity/jurisdiction (e.g., CySEC, FCA, ASIC, SEC). Determines which eToro legal entity the customer belongs to.

columns.name: PlayerLevelID
columns.comment: Customer experience/permission level. FK to Dictionary.PlayerLevel. 1=Standard (94%); 4=Popular Investor; 7=VIP. Determines available features and risk limits. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GuruStatusName
columns.comment: Human-readable PI tier name. Values: No, Certified, Cadet, Rising Star, Champion, Elite, Elite Pro, Removed, Rejected. Used in BackOffice customer views, Trade procedures, and SalesForce integration. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.GuruStatus)

columns.name: Occurred
columns.comment: The UTC timestamp when a position was either opened or closed.

columns.name: IsBuy
columns.comment: Trade direction: 1=Buy/Long (profits if price rises), 0=Sell/Short (profits if price falls).

columns.name: Leverage
columns.comment: Leverage multiplier (e.g., 1=no leverage/real ownership, 5=5x). Leverage=1 + IsSettled=1 → REAL settlement. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.

columns.name: MirrorID
columns.comment: Copy-trade relationship: 0=manually opened, >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader (references Trade.Mirror.MirrorID).

columns.name: Units
columns.comment: The size of a position in units of the underlying instrument.

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: Hedge server routing/executing hedges for this position. References Trade.HedgeServer.HedgeServerID.

columns.name: ClosePositionReasonID
columns.comment: Close reason. Refs Dim_ClosePositionReason: 0=Customer,1=StopLoss,5=TakeProfit,7=Rollover,8=BackOffice,9=HierarchicalClose,13=CopySL,17=ManualUnregister,19=Redeem,23=Alignment,24=Delist,26=Expiry.

columns.name: ClosePositionReasonName
columns.comment: DWH rename of production `ClosePositionActionName`. Human-readable closure trigger label. E.g., "Customer", "Stop Loss", "Hierarchical Close", "BSL". Used in account statements, trading reports, and position analytics. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.ClosePositionActionType)

columns.name: IsChild
columns.comment: A flag indicating whether a position is the remainder of a partial close event.

columns.name: IsParent
columns.comment: A flag indicating whether a position has had partial-close children created.

columns.name: IsCopy
columns.comment: A flag indicating whether a position was auto-opened via CopyTrader.

columns.name: IsReal
columns.comment: A flag indicating whether a position represents real ownership of shares.

columns.name: Volume
columns.comment: Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate). Pro-rated for partial close — parents and children each show volume pro-rated to their own AmountInUnitsDecimal.

columns.name: Commission
columns.comment: The full spread prorated by units, calculated as the product of the amount in units decimal and the full commission, adjusted for partial closes.

columns.name: Ticket_Fees
columns.comment: Total ticket fees at close — fixed $ or % of volume. More fees may accrue; full breakdown in History.Cost. NULL for open positions.

columns.name: Session
columns.comment: This column represents a session based on the opening and closing of positions, where the opening is marked by the UTC timestamp ’OpenOccurred’ and the closing is marked by the UTC timestamp ’CloseOccurred’, with open positions indicated by a ’CloseOccurred’ date of 1900-01-01.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Year-month-day partition value (YYYYMMDD as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*10000 + MONTH(etr_ts)*100 + DAY(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for day-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: AccountID
columns.comment: Account identifier within the trading platform.

columns.name: AccountManagerID
columns.comment: Assigned account manager (sales/retention agent). FK to Dim_AccountManager.

columns.name: AccountManager
columns.comment: This column combines the first and last names of staff members from the dim_manager table to produce a display name, where the last name ’*’ indicates a functional or shared account.

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: This column represents a customer’s internal primary key, assigned at registration, which serves as a unique identifier across all tables in the etoro database.

columns.name: ClubSort
columns.comment: Display order for tier hierarchy. 0=Internal/N/A, 1=Bronze, 2=Silver, 3=Gold, 4=Platinum, 5=Platinum Plus, 6=Diamond. Use ASC sort on this column for correct tier rank ordering. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.PlayerLevel)

columns.name: OwnerID
columns.comment: Salesforce CRM 18-character object ID for this manager (e.g., 0050800000DitvwAAB). Set via post-load UPDATE from SalesForce_DB_Prod_dbo_SalesForceToBOManagerMapping. NULL for managers not present in the Salesforce mapping. (Tier 2 - SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: ActionTypeID
columns.comment: Event classifier - join `Dim_ActionType` for `Name` / `Category`. Drives sparse column population. Derived from **`CreditTypeID`** & branch router in loader + positional feeds. (Tier 1 - History.Credit / Trade snapshots / STS / Customer payloads)

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: Position / ledger amount discipline per branch (cash change on opens; fee/deposit sizing on ledger rows - see lineage). Must be  >= 0 on trade opens historically. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl / History.Credit)

columns.name: Occurred
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when the action occurred. For position opens: when position was opened. For logins: login time. For credits: when the credit was recorded. (Tier 1 - source-dependent)

columns.name: ParentCID_DM
columns.comment: Leader customer ID. The user whose trades are copied. Trade.GetActiveCopiersForParents filters by ParentCID. (Tier 1 - Trade.Mirror)

columns.name: ParentUserName
columns.comment: Leader username at mirror creation. Denormalized for display; Trade.RegisterMirror passes from caller. (Tier 1 - Trade.Mirror)

columns.name: AccountManagerID
columns.comment: Currently assigned BackOffice sales/service agent (renamed from ManagerID). FK to BackOffice.Manager. NULL = unassigned. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: RegulationID
columns.comment: Regulatory entity governing this account. FK to Dictionary.Regulation. Top values: CySEC=7.39M, BVI=7.30M, FCA=1.17M. Changes trigger RegulationChangeDate update. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Manual override name for the marketing region, from Ext_Dim_Country. May differ from Region (e.g., Albania: Region=ROE, MarketingRegionManualName=CEE). Used when the automated MarketingRegion label needs a business-friendly correction. (Tier 3 - Ext_Dim_Country live data)

columns.name: ClubID
columns.comment: Customer player-level tier, where 0=N/A, 1=Bronze, 2=Platinum, 3=Gold, 4=Internal.

columns.name: Club
columns.comment: Tier display name, such as Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A.

columns.name: ClubSort
columns.comment: Display order for tier hierarchy, ranging from 0=Internal/N/A to 6=Diamond.

columns.name: Investment_Date
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when an action occurred, such as position opens, logins, or credits.

columns.name: Gross_Alpha_Inflow_Amount
columns.comment: Position or ledger amount, which must be >= 0 on trade opens.

columns.name: Days_Open
columns.comment: The number of days since the action occurred, based on the UTC timestamp when the action took place.

columns.name: Net_Eligible_Investment_Potential
columns.comment: Potential investment amount, where Amount is the position or ledger amount with a discipline per branch, and must be >= 0 on trade opens.

columns.name: Number_Funded_Alpha_Investors_Potential
columns.comment: Potential number of funded alpha investors, based on Amount and staff member names.

columns.name: Number_of_Investors_Points_Potential
columns.comment: Potential number of investors with points, derived from Amount and staff member names.

columns.name: Amount_Invested_Points_Potential
columns.comment: Potential amount invested with points, calculated from Amount and staff member names.

columns.name: Bonus_Points_Potential
columns.comment: Potential bonus points, based on Amount and staff member names.

columns.name: Total_Points_Potential
columns.comment: Potential total points, derived from Amount and staff member names.

columns.name: Net_Eligible_Investment
columns.comment: Eligible investment amount, where Amount is the position or ledger amount with a discipline per branch, and must be >= 0 on trade opens.

columns.name: Number_Funded_Alpha_Investors
columns.comment: Number of funded alpha investors, based on Amount and staff member names.

columns.name: Number_of_Investors_Points
columns.comment: Number of investors with points, derived from Amount and staff member names.

columns.name: Amount_Invested_Points
columns.comment: Amount invested with points, calculated from Amount and staff member names.

columns.name: Bonus_Points
columns.comment: Amount of bonus points, where amount refers to the position or ledger amount with a discipline per branch, and must be greater than or equal to 0 on trade opens.

columns.name: Total_Points
columns.comment: Total amount of points, where amount refers to the position or ledger amount with a discipline per branch, and must be greater than or equal to 0 on trade opens.

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: Reporting date (@Date parameter). Clustered index key. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Instrument identifier. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument. NULL when Apex reports a position eToro cannot match to an InstrumentID. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 - Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: ISINCode
columns.comment: International Securities Identification Number. From Dim_Instrument or eToro-side data. May be NULL if Apex provides only CUSIP. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Etoro_Units
columns.comment: eToro's internal view of total shares held/hedged for this instrument×HS at EOD. From Dealing_Duco_EODRecon (and daylight savings supplement). NULL -> zero if NULLIF applied. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Apex_Units
columns.comment: Apex’s reported total shares in custody for this instrument×HS at EOD. From LP_APEX_EXT982_3EU (SUM of TradeQuantity). NULL when Apex has no holding. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Etoro_Rate
columns.comment: eToro’s EOD price for this instrument (from Dealing_Duco_EODRecon.eToroRate). Used for USD amount computation. NULLIF(0) applied. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Apex_Rate
columns.comment: Apex’s reported closing price (LP_APEX_EXT982_3EU.ClosingPrice). (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Etoro_Amount
columns.comment: eToro’s USD dollar value of holdings: `Etoro_Units × Etoro_Rate`. From Dealing_Duco_EODRecon.eToroUSDAmount. NULLIF(0) applied. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Apex_Amount
columns.comment: Apex’s reported market value in USD: `SUM(MarketValue)` from LP file. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: ETL metadata: `GETDATE()` at SP run time. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: HedgeServer ID from HS/LP mapping (#Fivetran.hs_dealing_desk). Identifies which eToro dealing desk/hedge server this account belongs to. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Apex ticker symbol (e.g., 'OPENW', 'AUGO'). From Apex LP file or Dim_Instrument.Symbol. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Client_NOP
columns.comment: Client Net Open Position in USD: `SUM(ClientAmount)` from Dealing_Duco_EODRecon. Represents the total client-side exposure in this instrument (what clients hold). (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Client_NOP_Units
columns.comment: Client Net Open Position in shares: `SUM(ClientUnits)` from Dealing_Duco_EODRecon. Used for hedging diff calculation in Dealing_ApexRecon_Hedging. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: CUSIP
columns.comment: CUSIP (Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures) identifier. 9-character US security identifier. Used for CUSIP-based matching between Apex and DWH. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: Exchange
columns.comment: Exchange name from Dim_Instrument (e.g., 'Nasdaq', 'NYSE'). Used to identify RTH instruments. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: AccountNumber
columns.comment: Apex LP account number from #Fivetran mapping (lp_accounts). Identifies which specific Apex sub-account holds this position. (Tier 2 - SP_Apex_Recon)

columns.name: etr_y
columns.comment: Year partition value injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ym
columns.comment: Year-month partition value (YYYYMM as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*100 + MONTH(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for month-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Year-month-day partition value (YYYYMMDD as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*10000 + MONTH(etr_ts)*100 + DAY(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for day-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: Report date for the trade activity reconciliation. (Tier 2 -- SP_Apex_Recon, @Date)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: eToro instrument identifier. (Tier 2 -- SP_DataForDuco, BI_DB_dbo.BI_DB_PositionPnL.InstrumentID)

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 - Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: ISIN
columns.comment: International Securities Identification Number (ISO 6166). Unique 12-char alphanumeric code identifying a security.

columns.name: IsBuy
columns.comment: Trade direction: 1=buy, 0=sell. (Tier 2 -- SP_Apex_Recon, derived from Buy/Sell column in ActivityRecon)

columns.name: Etoro_Units
columns.comment: Total LP units executed on the hedge server for the date. (Tier 2 -- SP_DataForDuco, CopyFromLake.etoro_Hedge_ExecutionLog.Units)

columns.name: Apex_Units
columns.comment: Total units reported by Apex for the same instrument/direction. (Tier 2 -- SP_Apex_Recon, Dealing_staging.LP_APEX_EXT872_3EU_217314.Units)

columns.name: Etoro_Rate
columns.comment: Weighted average execution rate on the eToro side. (Tier 2 -- SP_Apex_Recon, Dealing_Duco_ActivityRecon.eToro_AvgRate)

columns.name: Apex_Rate
columns.comment: Weighted average rate reported by Apex. (Tier 2 -- SP_Apex_Recon, Dealing_staging.LP_APEX_EXT872_3EU_217314.Rate)

columns.name: Etoro_Amount
columns.comment: Trade value on the eToro side in USD. (Tier 2 -- SP_Apex_Recon, Dealing_Duco_ActivityRecon.eToroUSDAmount)

columns.name: Apex_Amount
columns.comment: Trade value reported by Apex in USD. (Tier 2 -- SP_Apex_Recon, Dealing_staging.LP_APEX_EXT872_3EU_217314.Amount)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Batch execution timestamp (GETDATE()). (Tier 3 -- SP_Apex_Recon, GETDATE())

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: Hedge server associated with the LP execution. (Tier 2 -- SP_DataForDuco, CopyFromLake.etoro_Hedge_ExecutionLog.HedgeServerID)

columns.name: AccountNumber
columns.comment: Apex account number (alphanumeric broker identifier, e.g., 3EW35324). (Tier 2 -- SP_Apex_Recon, Dealing_staging.LP_APEX_EXT872_3EU_217314.AccountNumber)

columns.comment: Year-month partition value (YYYYMM as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*100 + MONTH(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for month-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)

columns.comment: Stock exchange name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE, LSE). NULL for non-stock instruments. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: InstrumentTypeID
columns.comment: Instrument type category: 1=Currencies (forex), 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies. Note TypeIDs 3, 7, 8, 9 are unused gaps. Distribution: Stocks 82%, ETF 8%, Crypto 4%, Commodities 3%, Indices 2%, Currencies 1%. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: Name
columns.comment: Instrument name as defined in Trade.Instrument. For forex: pair notation (e.g., EUR/USD). For stocks: company name (e.g., Apple, Alphabet). For crypto: token name. This is the internal instrument name, not necessarily the display name shown to users (see InstrumentDisplayName). (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: Calendar date

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date key in YYYYMMDD integer format. Aliased from V_M2M_Date_DateRange.DateKey. Always < today (excludes current day). (Tier 1 - V_M2M_Date_DateRange.DateKey)

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID, a platform-internal primary key assigned at registration

columns.name: UserName
columns.comment: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index). (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Marketing region label for this country. Loaded from etoro.Dictionary.MarketingRegion.Name via JOIN on MarketingRegionID. NOT the geographic region from Dictionary.Region. 22 distinct values (e.g., "ROW", "Africa", "French", "Arabic Other"). Used for marketing campaign grouping. (Tier 2 - SP_Dictionaries_Country_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: PlayerLevelID
columns.comment: Customer experience/permission level. FK to Dictionary.PlayerLevel. 1=Standard (94%); 4=Popular Investor; 7=VIP. Determines available features and risk limits. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: PlayerStatusID
columns.comment: Compliance and trading account status. FK to Dictionary.PlayerStatus. 1=Active/Registered (97.5% of accounts); other values indicate restricted, closed, banned, or special states. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: AccountTypeID
columns.comment: Customer account classification. Default=1 (real retail account). Distribution: 1=18.614M, 0=44K, 2=37K, 6=17K, others <6K. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: MasterAccountCID
columns.comment: For sub-accounts: the CID of the master/parent account. NULL for standalone accounts. Supports multi-account hierarchies. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Short code for the regulation

columns.name: BonusCredit
columns.comment: Bonus credit balance from History.ActiveCredit. Used as threshold in ActualNWA/Liabilities CASE logic: NetEquity is compared against BonusCredit to determine the split between NWA and liabilities. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.BonusCredit)

columns.name: Credit
columns.comment: Outstanding credit/bonus balance from History.ActiveCredit. Last credit event per CID per day. Used as cap in WA_Liabilities. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.Credit)

columns.name: AUM
columns.comment: Assets Under Management. Formula: TotalMirrorPositionAmount + TotalCash - Credit. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.AUM)

columns.name: TotalPositionsAmount
columns.comment: Sum of all open position amounts (NewAmount) for this CID on this date across all asset classes. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.TotalPositionsAmount)

columns.name: TotalCash
columns.comment: Customer total cash balance. Running balance: previous day TotalCash + sum of TotalCashChange from History.ActiveCredit. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.TotalCash)

columns.name: TotalMirrorPositionsAmount
columns.comment: Sum of copy-trading position amounts (MirrorID > 0 AND ParentPositionID != 0). (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.TotalMirrorPositionsAmount)

columns.name: TotalMirrorCash
columns.comment: Cash available for copy-trading. Formula: TotalCash - Credit. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.TotalMirrorCash)

columns.name: CopyPositionPnL
columns.comment: Unrealized PnL from copy-trading positions only (MirrorID > 0). (Tier 1 - Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL.CopyPositionPnL)

columns.name: RealizedEquity
columns.comment: Total account value including cash, positions, and pending cashouts. If History.ActiveCredit.RealizedEquity is non-zero, taken directly; otherwise TotalCash + TotalPositionsAmount + InProcessCashouts. (Tier 1 - Fact_SnapshotEquity.RealizedEquity)

columns.name: PositionPnL
columns.comment: Total unrealized PnL in USD across all open positions. Uses V1 formula (PnLInDollars). "The difference between Realized Equity and Unrealized Equity is the Position PnL" (Confluence). (Tier 1 - Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL.PositionPnL)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: PositionID
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the position

columns.name: OriginalPositionID
columns.comment: For partial-close children: parent PositionID. When OriginalPositionID ≠ PositionID → partial-close child.

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Universal customer identifier across all eToro tables.

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Identifier for the financial instrument used in the position

columns.name: InstrumentTypeID
columns.comment: Instrument type category: 1=Currencies (forex), 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies. Note TypeIDs 3, 7, 8, 9 are unused gaps. Distribution: Stocks 82%, ETF 8%, Crypto 4%, Commodities 3%, Indices 2%, Currencies 1%. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: Position amount in USD; rewound via `Dim_PositionChangeLog` when SL/partial-close edits after `@dt`. (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Dim_Position.Amount / PositionChangeLog.PreviousAmount)

columns.name: Previous_Amount
columns.comment: Previous position amount in USD, rewound via Dim_PositionChangeLog when SL/partial-close edits occur.

columns.name: Units
columns.comment: Size in instrument units; split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log when applicable. (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Dim_Position.AmountInUnitsDecimal / split + PositionChangeLog)

columns.name: Previous_Units
columns.comment: Size in instrument units, split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log when applicable.

columns.name: InitForexRate
columns.comment: Open rate; split-adjusted in SP when position spans a split. (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Dim_Position.InitForexRate / split logic)

columns.name: Leverage
columns.comment: Leverage of the open position

columns.name: IsBuy
columns.comment: Trade direction: 1=Buy/Long (profits if price rises), 0=Sell/Short (profits if price falls).

columns.name: MirrorID
columns.comment: Copy-trade relationship: 0=manually opened, >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader (references Trade.Mirror.MirrorID).

columns.name: IsSettled
columns.comment: Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).

columns.name: IsChild
columns.comment: Flag indicating if a position is a child of a partial close event.

columns.name: IsParent
columns.comment: Flag indicating if a position has had partial-close children created.

columns.name: ClosePositionReasonID
columns.comment: Close reason. Refs Dim_ClosePositionReason: 0=Customer,1=StopLoss,5=TakeProfit,7=Rollover,8=BackOffice,9=HierarchicalClose,13=CopySL,17=ManualUnregister,19=Redeem,23=Alignment,24=Delist,26=Expiry.

columns.name: ClosePositionReasonName
columns.comment: DWH rename of production `ClosePositionActionName`. Human-readable closure trigger label. E.g., "Customer", "Stop Loss", "Hierarchical Close", "BSL". Used in account statements, trading reports, and position analytics. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.ClosePositionActionType)

columns.name: Total_daily_Volume
columns.comment: Open volume, calculated as rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate), pro-rated for partial close.

columns.name: Volume
columns.comment: Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate). Pro-rated for partial close — parents and children each show volume pro-rated to their own AmountInUnitsDecimal.

columns.name: VolumeOnClose
columns.comment: Close volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) at close. Same formula as Volume but at close-time values. Pro-rated for partial close.

columns.name: Total_Daily_Commission
columns.comment: Full spread prorated by units, adjusting for partial closes, calculated as (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*FullCommission.

columns.name: OverNightFee
columns.comment: Fee amount for nightly/weekend fees, identified by ActionTypeID = 35.

columns.name: TicketFees
columns.comment: Fees for ActionTypeID = 35, encoded from Description heuristics, with Amount being position or ledger amount discipline per branch.

columns.name: Total_Daily_Fees_DP
columns.comment: Total ticket fees at open, which may include fixed $ or % of volume, with more fees possibly added later.

columns.name: Duration_seconds
columns.comment: Duration of a position in seconds, calculated using the close timestamp and open timestamp.

columns.name: Duration_minutes
columns.comment: Duration of a position in minutes, calculated using the close timestamp and open timestamp.

columns.name: Duration
columns.comment: Duration of a position, calculated using the close date and open timestamp.

columns.name: Exchange
columns.comment: Stock exchange name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE, LSE). NULL for non-stock instruments. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: NetProfit
columns.comment: Closed PnL in USD. Zero while open. Set at close: ROUND(@NetProfit / 100, 2).

columns.name: PositionPnL
columns.comment: Unrealized P&L in USD; from `PnLInDollars` (replaces legacy formula). (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Dim_Position.PnLInDollars)

columns.name: Previous_Position_PnL
columns.comment: Unrealized P&L in USD, calculated from PnLInDollars.

columns.name: NOP
columns.comment: Net open position in USD from units × pair rate × direction × conversion (see `#Pre_UnrealizedPnL`). (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, computed)

columns.name: DailyPnL
columns.comment: Day-over-day change: `PositionPnL - prior day PositionPnL` (NULL until post-switch UPDATE). (Tier 3 -- SP_PositionPnL, UPDATE vs prior DateID)

columns.name: Previous_DailyPnL
columns.comment: Day-over-day change in PositionPnL, calculated as current PositionPnL minus prior day PositionPnL.

columns.name: StopRate
columns.comment: Stop-loss rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves against.

columns.name: LimitRate
columns.comment: Take-profit rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves favorably.

columns.name: OpenOccurred
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when position was opened. Maps to Occurred in production Trade.PositionTbl.

columns.name: CloseOccurred
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when close was written. 1900-01-01 for open positions.

columns.name: OpenDateID
columns.comment: Open date as YYYYMMDD int. DWH-computed from OpenOccurred. Indexed.

columns.name: CloseDateID
columns.comment: Close date as YYYYMMDD int. 0=still open. Part of clustered index. Key filter for open vs closed.

columns.name: EndForexRate
columns.comment: Instrument exchange rate at close. NULL for open positions. Used in NetProfit calculation.

columns.name: Change_Price
columns.comment: Change in price, calculated using the per-unit price-move expression and USD conversion factor.

columns.name: Price
columns.comment: Per-unit price-move expression × USD conversion factor from `#Pre_UnrealizedPnL` (bid/ask vs InitForexRate and instrument FX chain). (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, computed from #OpenPositions + Dim_Instrument + #Prices)

columns.name: Previous_Price
columns.comment: Per-unit price-move expression times USD conversion factor, using InitForexRate and instrument FX chain.

columns.name: RateBid
columns.comment: EOD bid from latest `Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit` row before `@ReportDate`, split-adjusted; uses `BidLastWithoutSpread` when discounted. (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit + split)

columns.name: PreviousBid

columns.name: PreviousAsk

columns.name: InitConversionRate

columns.name: LastOpConversionRate
columns.comment: Conversion rate from most recent overnight operation for non-USD instruments.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Regulatory entity/jurisdiction (e.g., CySEC, FCA, ASIC, SEC). Determines which eToro legal entity the customer belongs to.

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Instrument identifier. Foreign key to Dim_Instrument.

columns.name: InstrumentName
columns.comment: Display name of the financial instrument (e.g., ’Apple’, ’Bitcoin’, ’EUR/USD’).

columns.name: AmountInUnitsDecimal
columns.comment: How many units of an instrument are in the position.

columns.name: InitForexRate
columns.comment:
The opening price (including commision) for any instrument (not only Forex). 
If Buy the commision will be added to the market price.
If Sell the commision will be deducted from the market price.

columns.name: EndForexRate
columns.comment: Price of the position at the time of closing.

objects.name: bi_output_dealing_nixar_delta_diffusionanalysis_v
objects.view_definition:
SELECT Date, PositionsTime, InstrumentName, InstrumentID, format_number(NOP,',###')  NOP, format_number(NOP_80Percent,',###') NOP_80Percent, IFF(Sigma IS NULL, 'Missing Sigma', format_number(Delta,',###')) Delta, IFF(Sigma IS NULL, 'Missing Sigma', format_number(DeltaSquared,',###'))  DeltaSquared, Mid, T, IFNULL(Sigma, 'Missing Sigma') Sigma, UpdateDate

        WHERE date_trunc('HOUR', PositionsTime) = date_trunc('HOUR', current_timestamp())

columns.comment: Regulatory entity governing this account. FK (WITH CHECK) to Dictionary.Regulation. Top values: CySEC=7.39M, BVI=7.30M, FCA=1.17M. Changes trigger RegulationChangeDate update and RegulationChangeLog insert. DEFAULT=0. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Identifier for the financial instrument used in the position

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: Exchange
columns.comment: Stock exchange name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE, LSE). NULL for non-stock instruments. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: IsChild
columns.comment: Flag indicating if a position is the child of a partial close event.

columns.name: IsParent
columns.comment: Flag indicating if a position has had partial-close children created.

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: The server through which the position got hedged

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: Position amount in USD; rewound via `Dim_PositionChangeLog` when SL/partial-close edits after `@dt`. (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Dim_Position.Amount / PositionChangeLog.PreviousAmount)

columns.name: Initial_InvestedAmount
columns.comment: Open volume calculated as rounded units * price * conversion rate, pro-rated for partial close.

columns.name: MirrorID
columns.comment: Copy-trade relationship: 0=manually opened, >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader (references Trade.Mirror.MirrorID).

columns.name: ClosePositionReasonID
columns.comment: Close reason. Refs Dim_ClosePositionReason: 0=Customer,1=StopLoss,5=TakeProfit,7=Rollover,8=BackOffice,9=HierarchicalClose,13=CopySL,17=ManualUnregister,19=Redeem,23=Alignment,24=Delist,26=Expiry.

columns.name: ClosePositionReasonName
columns.comment: DWH rename of production `ClosePositionActionName`. Human-readable closure trigger label. E.g., "Customer", "Stop Loss", "Hierarchical Close", "BSL". Used in account statements, trading reports, and position analytics. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.ClosePositionActionType)

columns.name: Leverage
columns.comment: Leverage of the open position

columns.name: Direction
columns.comment: Trade direction, where 1 indicates Buy/Long and 0 indicates Sell/Short.

columns.name: IsMirror
columns.comment: Indicates whether a trade was auto-opened via CopyTrader (MirrorID > 0) or manually opened (MirrorID = 0).

columns.name: ReaL_CFD
columns.comment: Flags whether a position is a real ownership (IsSettled = 1) or a CFD (IsSettled = 0), using IsSettled as a legacy flag.

columns.name: Total_daily_Volume
columns.comment: Total daily volume, calculated as the sum of open volume and close volume, where open volume is the rounded product of units, price, and conversion rate, and close volume is the same formula but at close-time values.

columns.name: Volume
columns.comment: Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate). Pro-rated for partial close — parents and children each show volume pro-rated to their own AmountInUnitsDecimal.

columns.name: VolumeOnClose
columns.comment: Close volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) at close. Same formula as Volume but at close-time values. Pro-rated for partial close.

columns.name: Total_Daily_Commission
columns.comment: Total daily commission, calculated as the sum of full commission by units and full commission on close, where full commission by units is the prorated spread by units and full commission on close is the market spread plus eToro markup at close.

columns.name: NetProfit
columns.comment: Closed PnL in USD. Zero while open. Set at close: ROUND(@NetProfit / 100, 2).

columns.name: PositionPnL
columns.comment: Unrealized P&L in USD; from `PnLInDollars` (replaces legacy formula). (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Dim_Position.PnLInDollars)

columns.name: previous_Position_PnL
columns.comment: Previous position profit and loss in USD, representing the unrealized P&L.

columns.name: NOP
columns.comment: Net open position in USD from units × pair rate × direction × conversion (see `#Pre_UnrealizedPnL`). (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, computed)

columns.name: DailyPnL
columns.comment: Day-over-day change: `PositionPnL - prior day PositionPnL` (NULL until post-switch UPDATE). (Tier 3 -- SP_PositionPnL, UPDATE vs prior DateID)

columns.name: OpenOccurred
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when position was opened. Maps to Occurred in production Trade.PositionTbl.

columns.name: CloseOccurred
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when close was written. 1900-01-01 for open positions.

columns.name: OpenDateID
columns.comment: Open date as YYYYMMDD int. DWH-computed from OpenOccurred. Indexed.

columns.name: CloseDateID
columns.comment: Close date as YYYYMMDD int. 0=still open. Part of clustered index. Key filter for open vs closed.

columns.name: InitForexRate
columns.comment: Open rate; split-adjusted in SP when position spans a split. (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Dim_Position.InitForexRate / split logic)

columns.name: EndForexRate
columns.comment: Instrument exchange rate at close. NULL for open positions. Used in NetProfit calculation.

columns.name: Price
columns.comment: Per-unit price-move expression × USD conversion factor from `#Pre_UnrealizedPnL` (bid/ask vs InitForexRate and instrument FX chain). (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, computed from #OpenPositions + Dim_Instrument + #Prices)

columns.name: Change_Price
columns.comment: Change in price, calculated as the per-unit price-move expression times the USD conversion factor.

columns.name: RateBid
columns.comment: EOD bid from latest `Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit` row before `@ReportDate`, split-adjusted; uses `BidLastWithoutSpread` when discounted. (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit + split)

columns.name: RateAsk
columns.comment: EOD ask from same price row, split-adjusted. (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit + split)

columns.name: Previous_Price
columns.comment: Previous price, representing the open rate or per-unit price-move expression times the USD conversion factor.

columns.name: Previous_Change_Price
columns.comment: Previous change in price, calculated as the per-unit price-move expression times the USD conversion factor.

columns.name: Previous_Amount
columns.comment: Previous position amount in USD, rewound via position change log when stop-loss or partial-close edits occur.

columns.name: Previous_Units
columns.comment: Previous size in instrument units, split-adjusted and rewound from partial-close log when applicable.

columns.name: Previous_DailyPnL
columns.comment: Previous daily profit and loss, representing the day-over-day change in position P&L.

columns.name: PreviousBid
columns.comment: EOD bid from latest Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit row before report date, split-adjusted, using BidLastWithoutSpread when discounted.

columns.name: PreviousAsk
columns.comment: EOD ask from same price row, split-adjusted.

columns.name: ConversionRate
columns.comment: Conversion rate from instrument currency to account currency at open, and end-of-day conversion rate used with PnL context.

columns.name: StopRate
columns.comment: Stop-loss rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves against.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: A calendar date.

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date key in YYYYMMDD integer format. Aliased from V_M2M_Date_DateRange.DateKey. Always < today (excludes current day). (Tier 1 - V_M2M_Date_DateRange.DateKey)

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID - FK to BackOffice.Customer(CID). The customer whose state changed. Part of multiple index key columns for customer-centric lookups. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.History.BackOfficeCustomer)

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Country ID — FK to Dim_Country.CountryID. Use Dim_Country for country name, region, regulation mapping, and risk group. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

columns.name: FirstLoggedIn
columns.comment: First real-money login timestamp. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=14. Set once, never overwritten (MIN logic). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

columns.name: FirstDepositDate
columns.comment: First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)

columns.name: FirstPosOpenDate
columns.comment: First position open date (manual or copy-trade). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,2). Uses MIN logic. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

columns.name: LastPosOpenDate
columns.comment: Most recent position open date (manual or copy). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,2) (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

columns.name: ProfessionalApplicationDate
columns.comment: Date the customer applied for professional (non-retail) classification. From ComplianceStateDB.Compliance.CustomerProfessionalQuestionnaireResult. (Tier 2 — SP code, ComplianceStateDB)

columns.name: Club
columns.comment: Customer’s eToro Club tier level. Resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Updated daily. (Tier 2 - SP code, Dim_PlayerLevel)

columns.name: DaysInCurrentClub
columns.comment: Number of days between TierChangeDate and DateID (DATEDIFF DAY). How long the customer has been at their current tier level. (T2 - SP_CID_DailyPanel_Club)

columns.name: LastClub
columns.comment: The customer’s previous club tier before their most recent change, classified by a non-sequential PlayerLevelID.

columns.name: CurrentClub
columns.comment: The customer’s current club tier, classified by a non-sequential PlayerLevelID.

columns.name: Seniority
columns.comment: The time elapsed since the customer’s first successful deposit date.

columns.name: Manager

columns.name: ClientCategory

Values: 1=Retail (97.3%), 4=Eligible Counterparty (2.6%), 5=Professional (0.03%), 2/3=sub-categories. DEFAULT=1 (Retail). Key input to TradingRiskStatusID computation. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.BackOffice.Customer)

columns.comment: DEPRECATED — Customer risk classification. A/B/C. ETL disabled 2023-05-09. Historical values only. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)

columns.name: CopyPositionPnL

columns.name: RealizedEquity

columns.comment: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 - Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: ISINCode
columns.comment: ISIN code. Used as the primary JOIN key between eToro and SAXO sides. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: Buy/Sell
columns.comment: Position direction - ’Buy’ or ’Sell’ - derived from net units sign. Requires bracket quoting in T-SQL. Use `BuyOrSell` alias instead.

columns.name: CurrencyPrimary
columns.comment: Instrument’s primary trading currency. GBX converted to GBP in eToro side. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: SAXO_Units
columns.comment: Units reported by SAXO LP at EOD. Negative for Sell positions. Aggregated across SAXO sub-accounts. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: eToro_Units
columns.comment: eToro's internal hedge netting position in units. Computed as `SUM((2*IsBuy-1)*Units)` from Netting tables at EOD cutoff. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: Clients_Units
columns.comment: Aggregate client-side net units from `Dim_Position`. `SUM((2*IsBuy-1)*ABS(AmountInUnitsDecimal))` for open positions at cutoff. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: SAXO-eToro_Units
columns.comment: Discrepancy: SAXO_Units - eToro_Units. Non-zero indicates hedge imbalance between eToro’s books and SAXO’s records. Special-character column. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: SAXO-Clients_Units
columns.comment: Discrepancy: SAXO_Units - Clients_Units. Measures how much SAXO holds vs what clients own. Special-character column. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: SAXO_LocalAmount
columns.comment: SAXO position value in the instrument’s local currency. `Amount × EODRate × FigureSize` from SAXO LP file. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: eToro_LocalAmount
columns.comment: eToro position value in local currency. `SUM((2*IsBuy-1)*Units*Bid_or_Ask)`. GBX adjusted by /100. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: SAXO_AmountUSD
columns.comment: SAXO position value converted to USD. `SAXO_LocalAmount × InstrumentToAccountRate` from SAXO LP file. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: eToro_AmounUSD
columns.comment: **Typo column name** (missing ’t’). eToro position USD value. `SUM((2*IsBuy-1)*Units*rate*ConvertRate)`. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: Clients_AmountUSD
columns.comment: Client-side aggregate position USD value. `SUM((2*IsBuy-1)*ABS(AmountInUnitsDecimal)*bid_or_ask*ConvertRate)`. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: Reality-Supposed
columns.comment: SAXO_AmountUSD - eToro_AmountUSD. Primary reconciliation metric: eToro’s hedging vs what SAXO actually holds. Special-character column. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: Reality-Client
columns.comment: SAXO_AmountUSD - Clients_AmountUSD. Secondary metric: SAXO holdings vs aggregate client exposure. Special-character column. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: eToro_Rate
columns.comment: eToro’s mid-price at EOD: `(Bid+Ask)/2` from `Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit`. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: SAXO_Rate
columns.comment: SAXO’s EOD rate from LP file. `CASE WHEN InstrumentCurrency=’GBP’ THEN EODRate/100 ELSE EODRate END` (GBX adjustment). (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: eToro-SAXO_Rate
columns.comment: eToro_Rate - SAXO_Rate. Rate discrepancy used to explain value differences. Special-character column. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: FX_Rate
columns.comment: USD conversion rate used. ISNULL(eToro FXratetoUSD, SAXO InstrumentToAccountRate). (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: HedgeServer identifier. Predominant values: 35 (most rows, Stocks-Real), 128 (Employee accounts). Cross-references `Dealing_staging.External_Fivetran_dealing_active_hs_mappings`. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: UnrealisedValueAccount
columns.comment: Unrealised P&L value from SAXO LP file (`UnrealisedValueAccount` / `UnrealisedPLAccount`). Used for internal SAXO position health monitoring. (Tier 2 - SAXO LP file)

columns.name: UpperBoundary
columns.comment: Risk limit in USD (HedgeRiskLimitUSD). Above this, the instrument triggers risk alerts. From `External_Etoro_Hedge_InstrumentBoundaries`. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: LowerBoundary
columns.comment: Lower threshold in USD (-OpenThresholdUSD). Equal to -1000 for illiquid instruments. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: illiquid/liquid
columns.comment: ’illiquid’ when LowerBoundary = -1000 (OpenThreshold = 1000); ’liquid’ otherwise. Special-character column. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: AccountNumber
columns.comment: SAXO LP account number (e.g., ’204400INETALM’, ’204400INET4’). From Fivetran mapping `lp_accounts` field. Identifies which SAXO sub-account holds the position. (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: Exchange
columns.comment: Stock exchange name (e.g., 'NASDAQ', 'NYSE'). ISNULL(eToro Dim_Instrument.Exchange, SAXO ExchangeDescription). (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: MaxTradeDate
columns.comment: Maximum trade date in YYYYMMDD integer format. Latest SAXO LP TradeDate for this instrument/account. Indicates when last trade occurred. (Tier 2 - SAXO LP file)

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Instrument ticker symbol (e.g., 'AAPL'). Added Feb 2025 (SR-301154). ISNULL(eToro, SAXO). (Tier 2 - SP_SAXO_Recon)

columns.name: SellCurrency

columns.name: S_AskUSD

columns.name: S_CustomerRate

columns.name: G_CustomerRateUSD

columns.name: G_Slippage_OMSPrice

columns.name: S_Slippage_1USD
columns.comment: Slippage calculation in USD, based on position size, trade direction, and USD conversion rate.

columns.name: G_Slippage_1USD
columns.comment: The execution price returned by the liquidity provider, considering the position size, hedge order direction, and USD conversion rate.

columns.name: Volume

columns.name: FullCommission

columns.name: G_Ranking

columns.name: G_Ranking2

columns.name: MirrorID

columns.name: CountryID

columns.name: Region

NOT the geographic region from Dictionary.Region. 22 distinct values (e.g., "ROW", "Africa", "French", "Arabic Other"). Used for marketing campaign grouping. columns.name: PlayerLevelID

columns.name: Regulation

columns.name: G_OMS_IMPricingRateUSD2

columns.name: G_RankingDESC

objects.name: bi_output_dealing_tables_h_pricelocks_hourly_report_v
objects.view_definition:
SELECT 
  DateID as Date
  ,CASE  InstrumentTypeID 
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Currencies'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Commodities' 
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Indices'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Stocks'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'ETF' 
    WHEN 10 THEN 'Crypto Currencies' 
    ELSE 'NA' 
  END AS Asset
  ,Exchange
  ,InstrumentID
  ,InstrumentDisplayName
  ,EventName
  ,sum(TotalLocks) as TotalLocks
  ,sum(TotalDuration) as TotalDuration
  FROM main.bi_dealing.bi_output_dealing_tables_h_pricelocks_hourly
  where
  DateID = date_format(current_date(), 'yyyyMMdd')
  and DuringSession=1
  group by DateID,InstrumentTypeID,Exchange,InstrumentID,InstrumentDisplayName,EventName
  having sum(TotalLocks)>50
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    NULL as Date
    ,NULL AS Asset
    ,NULL as Exchange
    ,NULL as InstrumentID
    ,NULL as InstrumentDisplayName
    ,NULL as EventName
    ,NULL as TotalLocks
    ,NULL as TotalDuration
order by Date desc,Asset,InstrumentID

objects.name: gold_dealing_oms_delta_diffusionanalysis_v
objects.view_definition:
with factors
as 
(
SELECT * from VALUES 
(335, 100, 42000) 
as Factors(InstrumentID, etoroFactor, contractFactor)
)
, raw_target
as
(
select
  *
from
  main.bi_dealing.gold_dealing_delta_diffusionanalysis
where
  InstrumentID in (335, 91)
  and Date = current_date()
  and date_trunc('HOUR', now()) = date_trunc('HOUR', PositionsTime)
)
select
CAST(InstrumentID as STRING) as Instrument,
"FuturesNOP" Model,
"portfolioId" ModelParameter,
"HS225-ExpiringFutures-Hedging_NOP" Value,
cast(PositionsTime as STRING) UpdateTime,
"1" ModelVersion,
"/api/db/table/PortfolioProperty" URL,
"portfolioId" OmsParam
from 
raw_target
UNION ALL
select
CAST(InstrumentID as STRING) as Instrument,
"FuturesNOP" Model,
"propertyId" ModelParameter,
CONCAT("NOP_", InstrumentID) Value,
cast(PositionsTime as STRING) UpdateTime,
"1" ModelVersion,
"/api/db/table/PortfolioProperty" URL,
"propertyId" OmsParam
from 
raw_target
UNION ALL
select
CAST(InstrumentID as STRING) as Instrument,
"FuturesNOP" Model,
"propertyValue" ModelParameter,
format_number(coalesce(aa.DeltaSquared /coalesce(ff.contractFactor, 1) * coalesce(ff.etoroFactor, 1), 0), 2) Value,
cast(PositionsTime as STRING) UpdateTime,
"1" ModelVersion,
"/api/db/table/PortfolioProperty" URL,
"propertyValue" OmsParam
from 
raw_target aa
left outer join
factors ff using (InstrumentID)

objects.name: gold_dealing_oms_internalmarket_imdynamicbookfutures_v
objects.view_definition:
with parameters as
(select * 
from 
main.bi_dealing.gold_dealing_oms_internalmarket_parameters
), valid_parameters --valid instruments are ones where the parameters table contain an OMS account as well as an eToro account
(
select InstrumentID, count(DISTINCT AccountType) count_sources
from parameters
where AccountType in ("oms", "etoro")
group by InstrumentID
having count_sources = 2
), valid_instruments
as
(
select aa.* from parameters aa
join valid_parameters bb using (InstrumentID)
),
oms as (
select
mp.InstrumentID, 
la.AccountType,
(Ask+Bid)/2 as Mid_o
from main.dealing.bronze_dealingstreaming_marketrates_dealing_market_feed_rates mp
join  valid_instruments la
on 
mp.LiquidityAccountID = la.LiquidityAccountID and 
mp.InstrumentID = la.InstrumentID and 
mp.receivedtime between date_add(MINUTE, -la.window_size_minutes, current_timestamp()) and current_timestamp() 
where 
mp.etr_ymdh between concat(current_date(), '-', HOUR(date_add(MINUTE, -60, current_timestamp()))) -- CAPPED aT 60 MINUTE LOOKBACK
and concat(current_date(), '-', HOUR(current_timestamp()))
) , pivoted 
as
(
SELECT * FROM (
   SELECT InstrumentID, AccountType, Mid_o FROM oms
 ) PIVOT (
   avg(Mid_o)
   FOR AccountType IN ("oms", "etoro")
 )
), final
as
(
select InstrumentID, 
cast ((aa.etoro - aa.oms)*(10 ^ di.Precision) as int ) Mid2MidDiff_Tick, current_timestamp() as UpdateTime
from pivoted aa
join main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_instrument di  USING (InstrumentID)
) --THE CODE BELOW IS ALL ORIGINAL CODE
SELECT InstrumentID

objects.name: v_hschangesummarylog_yesterday_email_csv
objects.view_definition:
WITH run_date AS (
   -- SELECT DATE('2025-10-30') AS run_date
   select date_sub(current_date(), 0) AS run_date
),

filtered AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        StartTime,
        EndTime,
        -- normalize comments: trim + lowercase + collapse multiple spaces
        regexp_replace(lower(trim(Comments)), '\\s+', ' ') AS Comments,
        etr_ymd,
        row_number() OVER (
            PARTITION BY 
                        etr_ymd,
                         regexp_replace(lower(trim(Comments)), '\\s+', ' ')
            ORDER BY
                        (StartTime IS NULL) ASC,   -- non-NULL first
                        (EndTime   IS NULL) ASC,   -- non-NULL first
                        StartTime           DESC,  -- latest time
                        EndTime             DESC   -- latest end
        ) AS rn
    FROM main.dealing.bronze_etoro_trade_positionshedgeserverchangesummarylog t
    CROSS JOIN run_date r
    WHERE to_date(etr_ymd) = r.run_date
)

-- 1) Real rows for yesterday (deduplicated)
SELECT
    ID,
    StartTime,
    EndTime,
    Comments,
    etr_ymd,
    current_timestamp() AS UpdateDate
FROM filtered
WHERE rn = 1

UNION ALL

-- 2) Fallback row when there are NO results for yesterday
SELECT
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT)    AS ID,
    CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS StartTime,
    CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS EndTime,
    'No actions for ' || CAST(r.run_date AS STRING) AS Comments,
    r.run_date              AS etr_ymd,
    current_timestamp()     AS UpdateDate
FROM run_date r
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered WHERE rn = 1)

columns.name: ID
columns.comment: Surrogate primary key. Returned by scope_identity() from PositionsHedgeServerChangeSummaryLogInsert and passed as OperationSummaryID to MovePositionsHedgeServers/MovePositionsHedgeServersByRerouteService. Referenced by Trade.PositionsHedgeServerChangeLog.OperationSummaryID (FK). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.PositionsHedgeServerChangeSummaryLog)

columns.name: StartTime
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when the reroute operation began. Set at INSERT via getutcdate() in PositionsHedgeServerChangeSummaryLogInsert. Marks the start of the batch. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.PositionsHedgeServerChangeSummaryLog)

columns.name: EndTime
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when the reroute operation completed. Initially NULL; updated by MovePositionsHedgeServers and MovePositionsHedgeServersByRerouteService on successful COMMIT. Difference from StartTime indicates operation duration. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.PositionsHedgeServerChangeSummaryLog)

columns.name: Comments
columns.comment: Normalized free-text description of the operation, originally supplied by the caller to PositionsHedgeServerChangeSummaryLogInsert, which is trimmed, converted to lowercase, and has multiple spaces collapsed into a single space, used to describe the operation (e.g., operator name, reason).

columns.name: etr_ymd
